channel.title: addyosmani/es6-tools Daily Updates RSS Feed
channel.description: Track your favorite github awesome repo, not just star it.

item.title: addyosmani/es6-tools Aug 29th, 2016
item.description:
Parsers

  • Esprima - JavaScript parser supporting ES6, parses to ESTree AST formatstars3.4k

item.title: addyosmani/es6-tools Feb 27th, 2016
item.description:
Editors

  • Learn ES6 transpilation options in Webstorm Read Blog Post

item.title: addyosmani/es6-tools Jan 28th, 2016
item.description:
Boilerplates

  • es6-jspm-gulp-boilerplatestars138 - Tooling to allow the community to use es6 now via babel in conjunction jspm, with source maps, concatenation, minification, compression, and unit testing in real browsers using es6.

item.title: addyosmani/es6-tools Jan 20th, 2016
item.description:
Transpilers

  • Facebook's jstransformstars480 - A simple utility for pluggable JS syntax transforms. Comes with a small set of ES6 -> ES5 transforms

    • Build-time transpilation

    Broccoli Plugins

  • TypeScript: broccoli-tscstars1

    • Polyfills

  • es6-promisestars7.2k - polyfill for Promises matching the ES6 API

item.title: addyosmani/es6-tools Jan 15th, 2016
item.description:
Build-time transpilation

Gulp Plugins

  • TypeScript: gulp-typescriptstars757

    • Build-time transpilation

    Grunt Tasks

  • Babel: grunt-babelstars433 - Turn ES6+ code into vanilla ES5 with no runtime
  • Traceur: grunt-traceurstars205 ES6 > ES5 transpilation, grunt-traceur-buildstars8
  • ES6 Module Transpiler: grunt-es6-module-transpilerstars85
  • Regenerator: grunt-regeneratorstars20 - ES6 generator functions to ES5
  • grunt-microlibstars29 - tools for libs using ES6 module transpiler (sample Gruntfile)
  • grunt-defsstars5 - ES6 block scoped const and let variables, to ES3
  • es6-transpiler: grunt-es6-transpilerstars11 - ES6 → ES5
  • TypeScript: grunt-tsstars320 - ES6+ > ES5/ES3 transpilation

    • Build-time transpilation

    Brunch Plugins

  • TypeScript: typescript-brunch

    • Webpack plugins

  • TypeScript: awesome-typescript-loaderstars2.4k

    • Duo plugins

  • TypeScript: duo-typescriptstars0

    • Connect plugins

  • TypeScript: typescript-middlewarestars9

    • Karma plugins

  • TypeScript: karma-typescript-preprocessorstars49

    • Sprockets plugins

  • TypeScript: typescript-railsstars255

    • Browser plugins

  • generator-typescriptstars19 - Yeoman generator for TypeScript apps

    • Transpilers

  • Lebabstars5.4k - Transformations for ES5 code to ES6 (approximates)

item.title: addyosmani/es6-tools Jan 10th, 2016
item.description:
Other

  • Rollup - Rollup is a next-generation JavaScript module bundler. Author your app or library using ES2015 modules, then efficiently bundle them up into a single file for use in browsers and Node.js

item.title: addyosmani/es6-tools Dec 10th, 2015
item.description:
Code generation

  • generator-gulp-babelifystars3 - Yeoman generator for Babel, Browserify and Gulp

item.title: addyosmani/es6-tools Nov 13th, 2015
item.description:
Transpilers

  • Square's es6-module-transpilerstars1.2k - ES6 modules to AMD or CJS
  • es6_module_transpiler-railsstars87 - ES6 Modules in the Rails Asset Pipeline
  • Bitovi's transpilestars24 - Converts ES6 to AMD, CJS, and StealJS.

    • Jade plugins

  • Traceur: jade-traceur

    • Code generation

  • grunt-init-es6 - scaffold node modules with unit tests, authored in ES6
  • Loom generators with ES6 ember modulesstars15
  • Brunch plugin for ES6 module transpilation

    • Polyfills

  • es6-shimstars3k - almost all new ES6 methods — from Map, Set, String, Array, Object, Object.is and more.

    • Parsers

  • Acornstars7.2k - A small, fast, JavaScript-based JavaScript parser with ES6 support, parses to SpiderMonkey AST format.

    • Other

  • es6-module-packager
  • Recaststars3.6k - Esprima-based JavaScript syntax tree transformer, conservative pretty-printer, and automatic source map generator. Used by several of the transpilers listed above, including regeneratorstars3.5k and es6-arrow-functionstars53.

item.title: addyosmani/es6-tools Oct 14th, 2015
item.description:
Module Loaders

  • Babel Module Loaderstars4.5k

item.title: addyosmani/es6-tools Oct 1st, 2015
item.description:
Editors

  • Grammar and transpilation packagestars475 for Atom

item.title: addyosmani/es6-tools Jun 18th, 2015
item.description:
Other

  • ES6 Lab setupstars28 - A simple setup for transpiling ES6 to ES5 using Babel or traceur with gulp and jasmine support.

item.title: addyosmani/es6-tools Jun 8th, 2015
item.description:
Other

  • babel-node - Run node cli with ES6 transpiling using Babel.

item.title: addyosmani/es6-tools May 10th, 2015
item.description:
Editors

  • ES6 syntax support in WebStorm and PhpStorm, compilation to ES5 with file watchers or task runners

item.title: addyosmani/es6-tools May 3rd, 2015
item.description:
Mocha plugins

  • Mocha Traceurstars15 - A simple plugin for Mocha to pass JS files through the Traceur compiler

item.title: addyosmani/es6-tools Apr 8th, 2015
item.description:
Code generation

  • generator-es6-babelstars9 - Yeoman generator for Babel apps

item.title: addyosmani/es6-tools Mar 14th, 2015
item.description:
Webpack plugins

  • Traceur: traceur-compiler-loaderstars4

item.title: addyosmani/es6-tools Mar 8th, 2015
item.description:
Browser plugins

  • Scratch JSstars353 - A Chrome/Opera DevTools extension to run ES6 on a page with either Babel or Traceur

item.title: addyosmani/es6-tools Feb 18th, 2015
item.description:
Build-time transpilation

Gulp Plugins

  • Babel: gulp-babelstars1.3k

    • Build-time transpilation

    Broccoli Plugins

  • Babel: broccoli-babel-transpilerstars54

    • Build-time transpilation

    Brunch Plugins

  • Babel: babel-brunchstars68

    • Webpack plugins

  • Babel: babel-loaderstars4.5k

    • Duo plugins

  • Babel: duo-babelstars13

    • Connect plugins

  • Babel: babel-connectstars22

    • Gobble plugins

  • Babel: gobble-babelstars8

    • Jade plugins

  • Babel: jade-babelstars39

    • Jest plugins

  • Babel: babel-jeststars139

    • Karma plugins

  • Babel: karma-babel-preprocessorstars167

    • Sprockets plugins

  • Babel: sprockets-es6

    • Transpilers

  • babelifystars1.7k - Babel transpiler wrapped as a Browserify transform

item.title: addyosmani/es6-tools Feb 17th, 2015
item.description:
Transpilers

  • Babelstars39k - Turn ES6+ code into vanilla ES5 with no runtime

    • Polyfills

  • core-jsstars14.6k - Modular and compact polyfills for ES6 including Symbols, Map, Set, Iterators, Promises, setImmediate, Array generics, etc. The standard library used by Babelstars39k.

item.title: addyosmani/es6-tools Feb 8th, 2015
item.description:
Other

  • TypeScript - A superset of ECMAScript with strict typing that aims to align with ES6

item.title: addyosmani/es6-tools Oct 22nd, 2014
item.description:
Transpilers

  • Traceur compilerstars8.1k - ES6 features > ES5. Includes classes, generators, promises, destructuring patterns, default parameters & more.

item.title: addyosmani/es6-tools Oct 6th, 2014
item.description:
Polyfills

  • Math.sign

item.title: addyosmani/es6-tools Aug 26th, 2014
item.description:
Other

  • es6-translatestars5 - Uses the ES6 loader hooks to load (node flavored) commonjs packages in ES6.

    • Transpilers

  • regexpustars206 — Transform Unicode-aware ES6 regular expressions to ES5

    • Build-time transpilation

    Gulp Plugins

  • regexpu: gulp-regexpustars4

    • Boilerplates

  • es6-boilerplatestars88 - Tooling to allow the community to use es6 now via traceur in conjunction with amd and browser global modules, with source maps, concatenation, minification, compression, and unit testing in real browsers.

item.title: addyosmani/es6-tools Aug 16th, 2014
item.description:
Transpilers

  • es6ifystars601 - Traceur compiler wrapped as a Browserify v2 transform

item.title: addyosmani/es6-tools Aug 4th, 2014
item.description:

  • Number.isFinite

item.title: addyosmani/es6-tools Jul 31st, 2014
item.description:
Parsers

  • esparsestars118 - ES6 parser written in ES6.
  • Traceur compilerstars8.1k also has built-in parser available under traceur.syntax.Parser.

item.title: addyosmani/es6-tools Jun 30th, 2014
item.description:
Other

  • es-dependency-graphstars26 and grunt-es-dependency-graphstars3 - Generate a list of imports and exports from ES6 module files, useful for preloading, bundling, etc.

    • Code generation

  • generator-node-esnextstars4 - Yeoman generator for Traceur apps

item.description:

item.title: addyosmani/es6-tools Apr 30th, 2014
item.description:
Polyfills

  • ES5 based shims in pure CJS style - Array, Object, Number, Math and String functions/methods, plus Map, Set, Symbol and WeakMap objects

item.description:

Gulp Plugins

item.title: addyosmani/es6-tools Mar 16th, 2014
item.description:
Transpilers

  • defsstars120 - ES6 block-scoped const and let variables to ES3 vars

    • Other

  • let-erstars184 - transpiles let-block block-scoping (not accepted into ES6) into either ES3 or ES6

item.title: addyosmani/es6-tools Mar 6th, 2014
item.description:
Polyfills

  • Object.assign

item.title: addyosmani/es6-tools Feb 28th, 2014
item.description:
Other

  • es6-import-validatestars6 and grunt-es6-import-validatestars3 - validate matching named/default import statements in ES6 modules.

Gulp Plugins

item.description:

  • Traceur: gulp-traceurstars170
  • Regenerator: gulp-regeneratorstars18
  • ES6 Module Transpiler: gulp-es6-module-transpilerstars61

item.title: addyosmani/es6-tools Dec 26th, 2013
item.description:
Other

  • ES.next showcasestars304 - real-world usage examples of ES6 features

item.title: addyosmani/es6-tools Dec 21st, 2013
item.description:
Polyfills

  • String.prototype.startsWith
  • String.prototype.endsWith
  • String.prototype.at
  • String.prototype.repeat
  • String.prototype.codePointAt
  • String.fromCodePoint
  • Array.prototype.find
  • Array.prototype.findIndex
  • Array.from
  • Array.of

item.title: addyosmani/es6-tools Dec 20th, 2013
item.description:
Polyfills

  • harmony-reflectstars437 - ES6 reflection module (contains the Proxy API)
  • Polymer's WeakMap shimstars45
  • ES6 Symbol polyfillstars177
  • ES6 Map Shimstars23 - destructive shim that follows the latest specification as closely as possible.
  • ES6 Map, Set, WeakMapstars4

    • Transpilers

  • es6-transpilerstars217 - ES6 > ES5. Includes classes, destructuring, default parameters, spread
  • Facebook's regeneratorstars3.5k - transform ES6 yield/generator functions to ES5

    • Editors

  • ES6 syntax highlighting for Sublime Text and TextMatestars28
  • DocPad plugin for Traceur

    • Module Loaders

  • beck.jsstars5 - toolkit for ES6 Module Loader pipelines, shim for legacy environments
  • ES6 Module Loader polyfillstars2.2k (compat with latest spec and Traceur)
  • js-loadersstars54 - Mozilla's spec-compliant loader prototype

item.title: addyosmani/es6-tools Dec 19th, 2013
item.description:
Other

  • looperstars16 - static analysis tools for ES6

    • Module Loaders

  • JSPM - ES6, AMD, CJS module loading/package management
